last_cycle.summary: Q212 done: RLHF mock AND-frac drift monitor. Unconstrained RLHF collapses at step 54 (L* drifts 3 layers). KL-reg (β=0.05) stable. AND-frac drop detects reward-hacking phase onset. KL preserves sharpness Δ=+0.058 vs unconstrained.
